title: Acme Robopolish
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Acme Robopolish''' was a [[Window/Legends|window]]-cleaning company that did business during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Utilizing [[Droid/Legends|droid]] models such as the [[INS-444 window installation droid|INS-444]] and the [[CLE-004 window cleaning droid/Legends|CLE-004]], the company was accused of plagiarism by the [[Jizz/Legends|jizz]] musician [[Fitz Roi]].

==Behind the scenes==
The name is probably a reference to the fictional [[Wikipedia:Acme Corporation|Acme Corporation]] from the [[Wikipedia:Looney Tunes|''Looney Tunes'']] universe, which was famous for producing nearly all kinds of imaginable gadgets.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2006-06-27 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''
